title: AD Login Failure
content: Check AD lockout status, reset password, verify replication, clear cached credentials, test login on web apps.

title: VPN Issues
content: Clear saved credentials, verify MFA sync, restart VPN client, check firewall and gateway status.

title: Outlook Issues
content: Test safe mode, disable add-ins, rebuild profile, repair OST file, check M365 service health.

title: Slow PC
content: Check CPU/memory usage, disable startup apps, scan malware, verify disk health, apply updates.

title: Printer Issues
content: Restart print spooler, clear queue, reinstall drivers, check network printer connectivity.

title: Network Issues
content: Run ipconfig renew, flush DNS, test gateway, check DHCP, verify switch/WiFi connection.

title: Mapped Drives
content: Run gpupdate, verify login scripts, check permissions, remap drive manually.

title: Teams Issues
content: Clear Teams cache, sign out/in, reinstall app, verify O365 service status.

title: MFA Problems
content: Resync device time, re-register authenticator app, verify account settings in Azure AD.

title: Software Install Failures
content: Run as admin, check permissions, disable AV temporarily, verify installer integrity.
